finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_05.md:99; chapters/chapter_05.md:203; chapters/chapter_05.md:517; chapters/chapter_05.md:588; chapters/chapter_05.md:612; chapters/chapter_05.md:748
finding_results.notes: Six targeted edits across all three exchange zones (car, street, bench). Anya swerves: (1) line 99 — she redirects from a sharp retort to honest 'That's kind of sad'; (2) line 588 — she stops mid-sentence defending Kaiser's instincts and recalibrates to plain honesty; (3) line 748 — 'You're twenty' lands gentle instead of sharp and she tries to walk it back. Damian breaks: (1) line 203 — he opens his mouth after 'You're very romantic' and produces no capper, moving to action instead; (2) line 517 — his smooth deflection dissolves into honest acknowledgment ('No. You didn't.'). Volley runs broken: the car 'bleak/scrutiny' 2-beat capper replaced with longer qualified exchange; the car exit 4-beat ladder cut to 3 beats plus action; the street 3-beat 'welcome/thank/eventually' ladder broken by non-verbal beat and honest response; the bench Kaiser 5-beat rapid-fire collapsed to 3 beats with visible swerve; the bench 'Cruel/Earned' 2-beat tail removed and replaced with physical observation; the bench closing 7-beat volley broken by 'He considered that' action tag and Anya's mid-line self-correction with narration.

pass_summaries.summary: Rebuilt the opener to cash out the calendar-surveillance seam, expanded the car scene into mission-specific pressure and couple-cover tactics, reworked the Bretz club sequence so Hartig is jointly earned through Anya's push and Damian's re-entry cover, added a sustained sensory silence in the park, differentiated the recognition beat through specific memory and accidental overfamiliarity, and brought the chapter above the 5500-word guardrail.

Roughened Anya/Damian dialogue across the car, street, and bench scenes to break the recurring polished-ladder volley pattern. Three visible Anya swerves (self-corrections mid-line in the car cover discussion, Kaiser defense, and final 'You're twenty' beat) and two Damian breaks (failed capper at the car exit, dissolved deflection in the street debrief) replace workshopped symmetry with pressure-shaped texture. No run of three consecutive one-line volleys in statement-rejoinder-capper rhythm remains in the targeted exchanges. All must-land beats, the damian_recognition payoff escalation, and chapter structure preserved.

Chapter 5 now lands its major turns through more concrete, character-true prose instead of repeated abstract cap formulas, and Damian's repeated jaw-tightening reaction has been varied without changing scene function or continuity.
